channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scale AI CEO discusses reliability concerns in artificial intelligence
item.description: According to Scale AI CEO Jason Droege, current AI technology often lacks the reliability needed for critical applications in business and government.

item.title: Report: Antisemitic assaults in U.S. reach 46-year high
item.description: An annual report from the Anti-Defamation League documents a rise in antisemitic incidents, including physical assaults.

item.title: RFK Jr. targets skeptical senator
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and his supporters aim to challenge a Republican senator, escalating tensions in the political landscape.

item.title: Doctors Face Challenges with AI Deepfakes
item.description: Artificial intelligence is enabling deepfake videos featuring doctors, raising concerns about misinformation and product promotion.
